headline: Jimmy Jay-Morgan — update
body: 🚨 Jimmy Jay-Morgan from Chelsea to West Brom, here we go! Deal agreed today for £4m total package. #CFC also included a sell-on clause as part of the deal. https://t.co/JNZwT5WCzO
text:
🚨 Jimmy Jay-Morgan from Chelsea to West Brom, here we go! Deal agreed today for £4m total package.

#CFC also included a sell-on clause as part of the deal. https://t.co/JNZwT5WCzO
